title: قرار وزاري رقم 49: في شأن قائمة المواد والمنتجات الطبية شبه المراقبة

provisions.title: MOHAP- LIST OF REGISTERED SCD MEDICINES (Generic name)*
provisions.content:
منالقرارالوزاري عينهعلى الوجهالتالي :MOHAP- LIST OF REGISTERED SCD MEDICINES (Generic name)*1-Any active ingredient(s) under CD or CD-Narcotics if it comes in combinationwith ingredient(s) listed below, it will fall in the more restrictedcategory.
2- Oral dosage form & parenteral of these active ingredientswill be considered as SCD. Topical preparations of these active ingredients willremain as POM unless otherwise stated.SI#ItemDescription1Acetyldihydrocodeine,(Acetyldihydrocodeine alone is Narcotic)
(NOT ALONE; When compounded with oneor more other ingredients and containing not more than 100 milligrams of thedrug per dosage unit and with a concentration of not more than 2.5 per cent inundivided preparations)2Acitretin3Agomelatine4Alprostadil(parenteral forms only)5Amitriptyline6Amisulpiride7Aripiprazole8Asenapine9Atomoxetine10Baclofen11Biperiden12Brexpiprazole13Bupropion14Buserelin15Buspirone16Cariprazine17Carisoprodol18Chloprostenol19Chloralhydrate20Chlordiazepoxidecombinations (not alone)21Chloroethaneor Ethyl Chloride (spray)22Chlorpromazine23Chlorzoxazone24Citalopram25Clomethiazole26Clomipramine27Clozapine28Codeine,(Codeine alone is Narcotic)
(NOT ALONE; When compounded with one or moreother ingredients and containing not more than 100 milligrams of the drug perdosage unit and with a concentration of not more than 2.5 per cent in undividedpreparations)29Cyclobenzaprine30Desflurane(inhalation solution)31Desvenlafaxine32Detomidine(Veterinary use only) solution for injection33Dexmedetomidine34Dextromethorphan35Dextropropoxyphene,(Dextropropoxyphene alone is Narcotic)
(NOT ALONE; For oral use containingnot more than 135 milligrams of DEXTROPROPOXYPHENE base per dosage unit or witha concentration of not more than 2.5 per cent in undivided preparations,provided that such preparations do not contain any substance controlled underthe 1971 Convention on Psychotropic Substances).36Difenoxin,(Difenoxin alone is Narcotic)
NOT ALONE; Containing, per dosage unit, notmore than 0.5 milligrams of DIFENOXIN and a quantity of atropine sulfateequivalent to at least 5 per cent of the dose of DIFENOXIN.)37Dihydrocodeine,(Dihydrocodeine alone is Narcotic)
(NOT ALONE; When compounded with one ormore other ingredients and containing not more than 100 milligrams of the drugper dosage unit and with a concentration of not more than 2.5 per cent inundivided preparations)38Dinoprostone(Delivery system, tablet & Gel)39Diphenoxylate(Diphenoxylate alone is narcotic)
(NOT ALONE, Containing, per dosage unit,not more than 2.5 milligrams of DIPHENOXYLATE calculated as base and a quantityof atropine sulfate equivalent to at least 1 per cent of the dose ofDIPHENOXYLATE)40DosulepineHCI41Duloxetine42Enflurane(inhalation solution)43Ephedrine44Escitalopram45Ethylmorphine,(Ethylmorphine alone is Narcotic)
(NOT ALONE; When compounded with one ormore other ingredients and containing not more than 100 milligrams of the drugper dosage unit and with a concentration of not more than 2.5 per cent inundivided preparations)46Fluoxetine47Flupenthixol48Fluphenazine49Fluvoxamine50Gallamine51Haloperidol52Halothane(inhalation solution)53Imipramine54Isofluane(inhalation solution)55Isotretinoin(oral form only)56Lecirelin(Veterinary use only)57Levosulpiride58LithiumCarbonate59Lurasidone60Maprotiline61Melitracen62Mesterolone63Methocarbamol64Mianserin65Milnacipran66MinaprineChlorhydrate67Mirtazapine68Misoprostol(both device & tablet)69Moclobemide70Naltrexone/ Bupropion71Nandrolone(parenteral form)72Nefazodone73Nicocodine,(Nicocodeine alone is Narcotic)
NOT ALONE; When compounded with one or moreother ingredients and containing not more than 100 milligrams of the drug perdosage unit and with a concentration of not more than 2.5 per cent in undividedpreparations)74Nicodicodine,(Nicodicodeine alone is Narcotic)
(NOT ALONE; When compounded with one ormore other ingredients and containing not more than 100 milligrams of the drugper dosage unit and with a concentration of not more than 2.5 per cent inundivided preparations)75Norcodeine,(Norcodeine alone is Narcitic)
(NOT ALONE; When compounded with one or moreother ingredients and containing not more than 100 milligrams of the drug perdosage unit and with a concentration of not more than 2.5 per cent in undividedpreparations)76Nortriptyline77Olanzapine78Opipramol79Orphenadrine80Oxytocin81Paliperidone82Papaverine83Paroxetine84Pholcodine,(Pholcodinealone is Narcotic)
(NOT ALONE; When compounded with one or more otheringredients and containing not more than 100 milligrams of the drug per dosageunit and with a concentration of not more than 2.5 per cent in undividedpreparations)85Prochlorperazine86Propiram,(Propiram alone is Narcotic)
(NOT ALONE; Containing not more than 100milligrams of PROPIRAM per dosage unit and compounded with at least the sameamount of methylcellulose.)87Propofol88Quetiapine89Reboxetine90Retigabine(AKA ezogabine)91Risperidone92Sertindole93Sertraline94Sevoflurane(inhalation solution)95Somatropin96Stanozolol97Sulpiride98Testosterone(oral & parenteral forms only)99Tetrabenazine100Thalidomide101Thiopentonesodium102Tizanidine103Trazodone104Tretinoin(oral form only)105Trifluoperazine106Trimipramine107Tropicamide(eye drops)108Venlafaxine109Vortioxetine110Ziprasidone111Zuclopenthixol

provisions.title: صدربتاريخ:25/4/2021م
provisions.content: ينشرهذا القراربالجريدةالرسميةويعمل بهاعتباراً مناليوم التاليلتاريخنشره.صدربتاريخ:25/4/2021معبدالرحمن بنمحمدالعويسوزيرالصحة ووقايةالمجتمعنشرهذاالقرارالوزاريفي عددالجريدةالرسمية رقم702ص199.أضيفصنف دوائيجديد باسم "Brexpiprazole" الى قائمةالموادوالمنتجاتالطبيةالمرفقة بهذاالقرار بموجبالمادةالأولى منالقرارالوزاري رقم 124تاريخ 08/08/2022م ، ثمنشرت القائمةالكاملةوالمحدثةمتضمنةًالصنفالدوائيالمضاف إليهاوالمذكورأعلاه بموجب
